query: SELECT m.id, m.dialogId, m.direction, m.text, m.telegramMessageId, m.createdAt FROM messages m ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute SELECT m.id, m.dialogId, m.direction, m.text, m.telegramMessageId, m.createdAt FROM messages m ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 20;
